text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, Tazuna pays a visit to my office.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer! I hope I'm not interrupting
anything!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Only a handful of students at the academy have
been able to find such success over the past three
years.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy that I could watch over you both this
entire time! ♪
choice_data_list: Thank you for working so hard for our sakes!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Would you and your trainee care to join me after
this?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But let's buy some apples for everyone first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, the three of us feast on ramen and
pan-fried dumplings.
